query: I'm writing a new Python module for our payment service - it needs a PaymentProcessor class, some helper functions, constants for supported currencies, and private validation logic.
帮我实现一个 LRU cache，用 Python 的 OrderedDict。需要 get、put、evict 方法，支持 max_size 参数
write a FastAPI endpoint that accepts a CSV upload, validates the columns, processes each row through our pricing engine, and returns a summary JSON response
fix the race condition in src/workers/task_queue.py - when two workers pick up the same job, the second one overwrites the first's result. Need to add proper locking
帮我重构 data_loader.py，把那个 200 行的 load_and_transform 函数拆成几个小函数，每个负责一个 stage
add a retry mechanism to the HTTP client in services/api_client.py with exponential backoff. Currently it just fails on the first timeout
implement a TypeScript React component for a searchable dropdown with debounced input, keyboard navigation, and async option loading from our API
帮我写一个 Rust 的 CLI 工具，读取 stdin 的 JSON lines，按指定字段 group by，输出每组的 count 和 sum
refactor the user authentication flow in auth/session.py to support both JWT and session-based auth. The current code only handles JWT
create a Go HTTP middleware that rate-limits requests by IP using a token bucket algorithm. Needs to handle concurrent access safely
what's the difference between asyncio.gather and asyncio.wait? When should I use which?
read src/models/order.py and explain what the calculate_total method does, step by step
run pytest -v tests/ and tell me which tests are failing and why
what database should I use for storing time-series sensor data? Compare PostgreSQL with TimescaleDB vs InfluxDB
update the README.md to include the new API endpoints and add a quickstart guide
list all the TODO comments in the codebase and group them by priority
帮我看看 CI 为什么挂了，最近一次 GitHub Actions 的 log 显示 test_integration 失败
compare our current docker-compose.yml with the production k8s deployment and check for config drift
git log --oneline the last 20 commits and summarize what changed this sprint
